title: Kenaitze Indian Tribe seeks feedback on bus route
summary: The Kenaitze Indian Tribe is developing a new fixed-route bus service and wants to know about transportation needs and destinations for central Kenai Peninsula communities. Kahtnu Area Transit bus service will be available to the general public, and the Tribe is asking community members to complete...

title: 14th NABOS expedition embarks to assess the state of the eastern Arctic Ocean
summary: A University of Alaska Fairbanks-led expedition embarks this week for a 38-day scientific cruise to assess the state of the eastern Arctic Ocean. The expedition, which is part of the Nansen and Amundsen Basins Observational System, is headed by Project Leader Igor Polyakov and NABOS Chief Scientist...
